---
title: "Data Visualisation"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

# GitHub activity visualisation

## Tech stack breakdown

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

language_table <- data.frame(
  language = c("Python", "Lua", "JavaScript", "HTML", "CSS", "Shell"),
  percentage = c(46, 24, 12, 8, 6, 4)
)

cat('<div class="bar-chart">\n')

for (i in seq_len(nrow(language_table))) {
  row <- language_table[i, ]

  cat(sprintf(
    '<div class="bar-row"><div class="bar-label"><strong>%s</strong><span>%.1f%%</span></div><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width: %.1f%%"></div></div></div>\n',
    row$language,
    row$percentage,
    row$percentage
  ))
}

cat('</div>\n')

```

## Contribution heatmap

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

set.seed(42)

contribution_table <- data.frame(
  day = seq_len(365),
  level = sample(0:4, size = 365, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.35, 0.25, 0.2, 0.15, 0.05))
)

contribution_table$count <- contribution_table$level * sample(1:3, size = 365, replace = TRUE)

cat('<div class="contribution-heatmap" aria-label="Random GitHub-style contribution heatmap">\n')

for (i in seq_len(nrow(contribution_table))) {
  day <- contribution_table[i, ]

  cat(sprintf(
    '<span class="contribution-day level-%s" title="Day %s: %s contributions"></span>\n',
    day$level,
    day$day,
    day$count
  ))
}

cat('</div>\n')
```
